reviews.title: ChatGpt Теряет людей деньги
reviews.content: Дает неправильные советы по покупкам чего то! Я покупаю..Потом оказывается что это совсем не то что мне было нужно! Сбивает с толку! Ужасно,что отвечает неправильно в 90 % случаев.. так нельзя! Обращаюсь к создателям чата! Поставьте функцию чтобы чат говорил не знаю либо это не точный ответ! Нельзя так уверенно обманывать людей

I’ve been using ChatGPT for a few months now and honestly, I expected way more. The responses feel generic and padded, like it’s more focused on sounding thorough than actually helping. Ask anything remotely nuanced and you get a wall of hedging that never commits to a real answer.
It also confidently states things that are just wrong, and the second you push back it completely folds. Like, did you actually believe what you said or not?
The upload limits are a constant headache too. You hit the cap faster than you’d expect and then you’re just stuck waiting, which completely kills your workflow when you’re in the middle of something important.
Memory is hit or miss, longer conversations fall apart, and the coding help goes in circles without ever really fixing anything.
For a paid subscription, it’s just not reliable enough. There are better options out there now.

reviews.title: Are we serious?
reviews.content:
I recently had my account with Claude, developed by Anthropic, disabled due to an age restriction that I was not previously aware of. I had only been using the platform for a short time, so having my account permanently disabled under these circumstances feels excessive.

There was no clear age verification step during the sign-up process, which made it easy to overlook this requirement. A more transparent approach—such as asking for age upfront or clearly notifying users of restrictions before account creation—would help prevent situations like this.

Additionally, the process of appealing the decision seems unnecessarily time-consuming, especially for a relatively simple issue. While the platform shows strong potential, this experience has been frustrating and has impacted my overall impression.

reviews.title: Customer service

reviews.title: Want to love it but it’s buggy
reviews.content:
I really enjoy this app’s aesthetics and layout, and of course, Claude is great. 

However there are some serious issues with it. Typing can slow down with long messages — this has gotten better with recent updates. 

The glaring issue is a bug where the read aloud feature is basically useless except for the most recent message. It won’t read the actual messages further up, but will read an entirely different message in the thread. The copy text button also selects the wrong message. This is clearly some sort of button mapping issue. 

I first noticed it when the feature to allow us to listen to the read aloud messages without having the app actively open was implemented. I do like this feature and wish it would also have better pause/play and rewind/forward functionality. 

The problem persists after several weeks, across multiple chats, through many app reinstall and phone restart attempts. I don’t like to leave a negative review but my messages to support have also been ignored for

reviews.title: Don’t bother

reviews.title: Still buggy despite latest patch
reviews.content: Transcriptions get cut off, missing half of your recording. And then if it’s longer than one sentence, the text field to read your recorded message and send it gets pushed off the bottom of the screen below the keyboard. You have to tap out of the message to a different message and tap back in for the text area to display correctly and see the button to send. These are bugs that could be easily fixed with their own product Claude Code. Why have they persisted for months now including multiple updates where they still haven’t fixed it? If Anthropic is a category leader, I couldn’t tell based on abject the lack of attention to detail by its product team.

reviews.title: Y’all got some work to do still
reviews.content:
Back two days later to update this review to 1 star after running out of useage 3 times in the last 24 hours from simply trying to get Claude to correct its own mistakes. I’m going back to ChatGpT simply so I can actually get some work done. I really hope you are reading these reviews and make some adjustments because you’re going to continue to hemorrhage users until you do. 

I like Claude but it has some real constraints compared to ChatGPT that make using it extremely frustrating. It can’t reference other chats? What’s the point of working on a project here when you have to keep reminding it of everything you’ve already worked on?! And I’m using it no more than I was using Chat yet keep maxing out on useage for the day even though I’m paying for Pro.

reviews.title: BASIC SEARCH for files created! So frustrating
reviews.content:
The search function in Claude.ai chat history is fundamentally broken and makes the platform unreliable for serious work. It searches only conversation titles assigned by the system, not actual message content. This means users cannot locate documents, formulations, legal filings, or any substantive work from past conversations unless they remember the exact title Claude randomly assigned.
Every mainstream messaging and productivity platform — Facebook Messenger, Gmail, Slack, iMessage — searches message content by default. This is a baseline standard.
For users doing serious professional work across multiple conversations — building business documents, legal filings, technical specifications, strategic plans — this deficiency is a critical failure. I’ve spent weeks developing detailed work in Claude conversations. That work is now functionally inaccessible because I cannot search for it. A search function that doesn’t search content is worthless. It renders everything I’ve built here

reviews.title: Technical Incompetence: Critical Failure in Zoho Email Formatting
reviews.content:
It is unbelievable that this system is incapable of fixing a basic error like double spacing when drafting emails. I have given clear and repeated instructions for the formatting to be compatible with Zoho, yet the AI ignores memory protocols and continues to output text with formatting errors that force me to manually edit every single response.
I have demanded that this configuration be saved in memory five separate times, and the system still fails. For a business owner looking to automate customer service, this tool is useless if it cannot follow a simple formatting instruction. It is a total waste of time; the lack of consistency and the inability to follow basic editing rules make this system unreliable for professional use.

reviews.title: Bring Back the Old Layout!
reviews.content:
The latest  Gemini iOS app update is completely devastating for anyone who reads or writes long-form text. The new UI and text layout are extremely poor and have ruined the user experience.
[1] The font weight is way too thin and completely ignores the iOS system's "Bold Text" setting.
[2] The line spacing and left/right margins are practically non-existent. Most critically, there is almost no difference between line spacing and paragraph spacing. The paragraphs are packed so tightly together that unless you look very closely, it is impossible to tell the difference between a simple line break and a completely new paragraph. Long texts are severely cramped, causing significant visual fatigue.
[3] The account avatar in the top right corner now disappears when a chat is open. This makes it incredibly frustrating to quickly switch between my personal and work accounts.
[4] The custom Gems in the left navigation panel have lost their UI colors. They are now all uniformly gray, making the e
